element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Collected during gameplay, increases offensive capability
Special items collected to cast magic, tactical defense/offense option
Increasing density and pattern complexity as levels progress

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Fast pseudo-3D scrolling with continuous threat pressure; relief provided through power collection and evasion success rather than safe zones

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction of basic shooting and movement patterns in controlled pseudo-3D space
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Weapon upgrades and spell collection create tactical depth; enemy density increases
notable_spikes: Introduction of complex obstacle patterns requiring precise dodging
Multiple simultaneous enemy formations in later stages

notable_level_patterns.description: Levels scroll into the screen vertically, horizontally, or diagonally in Space Harrier style, creating illusion of forward momentum. Player moves Cotton across screen space while threats approach
Weapon upgrade tiers and spell collection items punctuate shooting sequences, providing tactical repositioning moments and offensive/defensive variety
Player confined to visible screen area with lateral movement freedom, requiring rapid directional shifts to avoid incoming enemy fire and environmental obstacles
